steps.title: Find the vertex x-coordinate with x = -b/(2a)
steps.content: $f(t) = 55t - 2t^2$, so $a = -2$, $b = 55$. Vertex shortcut: $t^* = -\frac{b}{2a} = -\frac{55}{2(-2)} = \frac{55}{4}$. Since $g(t) = f(t) + 3$, the vertex occurs at the same $t^*$.

steps.title: Compute max g directly from the vertex formula
steps.content: The maximum of $f$ is $f(t^*) = 55 \cdot \frac{55}{4} - 2 \cdot \left(\frac{55}{4}\right)^2 = 2\left(\frac{55}{4}\right)^2$. So $\max g = 3 + 2\left(\frac{55}{4}\right)^2$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
